name: Madison Avenue Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil, 1 tablespoon of wine vinegar, 1 1/2 teaspoons of salt, and 1/8 teaspoon of pepper.
2. Pour the blended mixture over the potatoes. Toss gently to combine.
3. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
4. At serving time, add the quartered ripe olives, sliced hard-cooked eggs, thinly sliced celery, diced dill pickles, diced pimiento, grated onion, and mustard to the potato mixture. Toss again to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
